name: Lawson
facts: Teachers reportedly adjusted grading scales after witnessing Lawson.
Seen locking in during lunch like it's Game 7 and the camera crew somehow knew to arrive early.
There are whispers that one calm Lawson glance can reorganize a chaotic group assignment.
Multiple sources insist he carries himself like a player intro narrated by a major network voiceover.
The average school day gains 14% more narrative importance when Lawson is present.

timeline.title: Early sightings
timeline.detail: Word spreads through the corridors that Lawson has that rare combination of composure, timing, and very serious main-character angles.

timeline.title: The class discourse shifts
timeline.detail: Quietly becomes the most talked about individual in class, mostly by doing ordinary things with suspiciously high efficiency.

timeline.title: Random Tuesday peak
timeline.detail: Peaks during a random Tuesday. Analysts still study the tape, searching for a rational framework.

timeline.title: Aura goes public
timeline.detail: Public opinion settles on a new consensus: Lawson might actually be a premium-tier, once-in-a-generation human prospect.

timeline.title: Lore becomes official
timeline.detail: A highly detailed fan dossier is commissioned because reality clearly needed better coverage.

testimonials.name: Anonymous Insider
testimonials.quote: I've seen composure before. This was composure with production value.
testimonials.label: Hallway source

testimonials.name: Film Room Enthusiast
testimonials.quote: The footwork is clean, the timing is elite, and somehow the aura grades out even higher than the tape.
testimonials.label: Scouting report

testimonials.name: Concerned Statistician
testimonials.quote: We had to invent a new column for hallway gravitas. Lawson broke the old sheet.
testimonials.label: Data department

gallery.title: Arrival Energy
gallery.caption: A premium reconstruction of Lawson pulling up with the kind of calm that makes the entire setting look better produced.

gallery.title: Lunch Break Lock-In
gallery.caption: Witnesses reported unusual focus levels and what can only be described as quietly legendary posture.

gallery.title: Hallway Gravitas
gallery.caption: An exhibit dedicated to the unreasonable amount of franchise-player energy produced during standard movement.

quotes: Scouts still disagree on whether Lawson is a player, a movement, or a highly organized weather system.
St Bede's produced many good days. Lawson somehow made them all look like featured programming.
The calm is real. The timing is cleaner. The aura remains under active investigation.
Every generation gets a few people who seem edited by professionals. Lawson is one of those cases.
